themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "If a man vow a vow unto the LORD, or swear an oath to bind his soul with a bond; he shall not...". themes.label: Peace/Rest
